de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io.AbstractProblemLoader

Packages that use AbstractProblemLoader
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.control
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.io
Classes related to loading and saving proof files.

  • Uses of AbstractProblemLoader in de.uka.ilkd.key.control

    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.control that return AbstractProblemLoader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    AbstractProblemLoader
    AbstractUserInterfaceControl.load(Profile profile, File file, List<File> classPath, File bootClassPath, List<File> includes, Properties poPropertiesToForce, boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs, Consumer<Proof> callback)
    Opens a java file in this UserInterfaceControl and returns the instantiated AbstractProblemLoader which can be used to instantiated proofs programmatically.
    AbstractProblemLoader
    UserInterfaceControl.load(Profile profile, File file, List<File> classPaths, File bootClassPath, List<File> includes, Properties poPropertiesToForce, boolean forceNewProfileOfNewProofs, Consumer<Proof> callbackProofLoaded)
    Opens a java file in this UserInterfaceControl and returns the instantiated AbstractProblemLoader which can be used to instantiated proofs programmatically.

    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ProblemLoader
    This class extends the functionality of the AbstractProblemLoader.
    class 
    SingleThreadProblemLoader
    This single threaded problem loader is used by the Eclipse integration of KeY.
